scores.correctness_notes: Core content matches gold standard well: correct YAML structure, required fields (override, type, location), services/labels, and all three protocol types (loki, opentelemetry, syslog) with correct location formats. Missing the auto-label details (pebble_service, service.name, APP-NAME/SD-ID) mentioned in gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: The `services: [all, -debug-svc]` and `services: [-all]` minus-prefix removal syntax is not present in the gold standard and may be fabricated. The 'Pebble buffers and retries' claim is not verifiable from gold standard. The `_on_loki_push_api_endpoint_joined` event name and charm library details (charms.loki_k8s.v1.loki_push_api) are plausible but not verifiable.
